1. Prepare JSON payload for campaign creation
2. Include: name, type, variations, goals
3. Call POST /api/v1/campaigns
4. Verify campaign is created
5. Call GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}
6. Verify all fields match
expected: Campaign created via API with correct parameters. GET returns matching campaign data.
preconditions: User is logged in to VWO account with appropriate permissions.

expected: Notification preferences respected. Disabled channels don't send. Enabled channels deliver correctly.
preconditions: Active VWO account with valid subscription.

1. Prepare JSON payload for campaign creation
2. Include: name, type, variations, goals
3. Call POST /api/v1/campaigns
4. Verify campaign is created
5. Call GET /api/v1/campaigns/{id}
6. Verify all fields match
expected: Campaign created via API with correct parameters. GET returns matching campaign data.
preconditions: User is logged in to VWO account with appropriate permissions.

1. Call GET /api/v1/campaigns rapidly
2. Send 100 requests in 1 minute
3. Check response for 429 status code
4. Verify Retry-After header present
5. Wait for rate limit window to reset
6. Verify normal requests resume
expected: Rate limiting kicks in after threshold. 429 returned with Retry-After header. Requests resume after window.
preconditions: User is logged in to VWO account with appropriate permissions.
